subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art the Possessor of all being and Lord of the entire creation! Thou seest how I have set my gaze on the horizon of Thy grace as one entreating the ocean of Thy pardon
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا مالک الوجود و سلطان الموجود ترانی ناظرا الی افق فضلک نظره من یسئل بحر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Manifestation of God does not act of own volition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
